query: SELECT er.id, er.project_consultant_id, er.eval_rank, er.can_rank, er.total_true_cost, cm.code FROM cpa_evaluation_results er JOIN cpa_project_consultants pc ON pc.id = er.project_consultant_id JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id WHERE pc.cpa_project_id = 120001 ORDER BY COALESCE(er.eval_rank, 999), er.total_true_cost
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT er.id, er.project_consultant_id, er.eval_rank, er.can_rank, er.total_true_cost, cm.code FROM cpa_evaluation_results er JOIN cpa_project_consultants pc ON pc.id = er.project_consultant_id JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id WHERE pc.cpa_project_id = 120001 ORDER BY COALESCE(er.eval_rank, 999), er.total_true_cost
